profile_backing.full_profile_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

candidate.lever: packed 16-column B-panel GEMM traversal for matmul_2d
candidate.description: Packed each 16-column B panel into contiguous storage, then reused that panel across all output rows while preserving each output cell's original l=0..k-1 scalar accumulation order; tail columns used the original scalar order.

proof_test.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 3 tests passed in candidate state, including adversarial signed-zero, infinity, and NaN-payload bit-pattern coverage over full panel plus tail columns.

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved row-major output values and each output cell accumulated l=0..k-1 in ascending order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: GEMM has no comparison or tie-breaking behavior.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same scalar multiplication and addition sequence per output cell; no FMA, reassociation, partial-sum merge, SIMD reduction, mixed precision, or Strassen-style reordering was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: matmul_2d consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public error path changed in candidate state; slice indexing stayed in matmul_2d.

alien_source.primitive_family: cache-aware dense linear algebra with packed/tiled kernels and communication-avoiding follow-up decompositions
alien_source.applied_slice: Tried a packed B-panel traversal after local-accumulator col8 and 4x4 schedules regressed.

next_primitive.target: recursive/cache-oblivious GEMM traversal preserving per-cell ascending-k accumulation
next_primitive.reason: Packed B panels improved reuse in theory but added copy and traversal overhead that regressed the measured 512x512 GEMM hotspot. The next pass should change the traversal recursively around cache-sized output submatrices while retaining the original scalar contribution order per cell.
proof_obligations: each output cell receives contributions in the original l=0..k-1 order
no FMA, reassociation, mixed precision, RNG, tie-breaking, or public error change
next_primitive.fallback_trigger: Reject and restore source if same-worker RCH Criterion mean does not beat the retained baseline with Score>=2.0.
